title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
Whisk egg yolks with cheeses and pepper.
Toss hot pasta with pancetta, remove from heat.
Add egg mixture and toss quickly.

reviews.text: Absolutely perfect! I used thick-cut bacon instead of pancetta and added a splash of pasta water at the end. The consistency was creamy and delicious.
Good recipe but needed more salt. I added extra Pecorino and a pinch of red pepper flakes for some heat.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
